result.stderr:
ChurnR 1.1.0+8e6040e3138d5d8f5f053f091aad7b6a43d7e51a
Copyright (C) 2026 Christoph Kopf

  -d, --from-date    Past date to calculate churn from. Absolute in dd-mm-yyyy
                     or number of days back from now.

  -c, --churn        Minimal churn. Specify either a number for minimum, or
                     float for precent.

  -t, --top          Return this number of top records.

  -r, --report       Type of report to output. Use one of: table (default), xml,
                     csv, chartjs, simple

  -x, --exclude      Exclude resources matching a list of regular expressions

  -n, --include      Include resources matching this regular expression

  -o, --output       When set, writes the report to a specific file, to console
                     otherwise.

  -p, --path         Set path to your repository otherwise defaults to current
                     directory.

  --help             Display this help screen.

  --version          Display version information.
